description: Entities that have collectible variant properties. Sources: Microsoft Learn and testing.

minecraft:color.description: PaletteColor (0-15) for entity main color. Works on vanilla entities with predefined color values.

minecraft:color2.description: PaletteColor (0-15) for entity secondary color. Only tropical fish.

minecraft:climate_variant.description: Farm animal climate variant set at spawn based on biome tags.
